archive_data.question_text: नागरहोल राष्ट्रीय उद्यान ______ में स्थित है।

explanation.english: Nagarhole National Park is located in the state of Karnataka. It is also known as Rajiv Gandhi National Park and is part of the Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve.
explanation.tanglish: Nagarhole National Park Karnataka maanilathil ulladhu. Idhu Rajiv Gandhi National Park endum ariyapadugiradhu, Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve-il pagam indha park.

archive_data.question_text: 1820 में, थॉमस मुनरो ने निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी लगान व्यवस्था आरंभ की थी?

explanation.english: Thomas Munro, the Governor of Madras, introduced the Ryotwari system in 1820. Under this system, revenue was collected directly from the cultivators (ryots) without any intermediary.
explanation.tanglish: Thomas Munro, Madras Governor-aga panniyatu seithavar, 1820-aamai Ryotwari vari thittathai arambithaar. Indha thittathil, adimaiyaga velai seivavigal (ryots) idam direct-aga vari kuttappattadhu, yarum madhyasthan illamal.

archive_data.question_text: गांधार कला शैली ______ कला से प्रभावित थी।

explanation.english: Gandhara art flourished in the northwestern Indian subcontinent and was heavily influenced by Greek (Greco-Roman) artistic traditions following Alexander the Great's conquests.
explanation.tanglish: Gandhara kalai Indiavin vadakku paagathil palandadaindhadhu. Idhu Greek (Yunaani) matrum Roma kalai murai-kalin moolamaga athigamaaga pabala paduthapattadhu, Alexander peru vijayangalin pinbu.
